title: NEXT STEPS - 211info
text: JACKSON STREET YOUTH SERVICES NEXT STEPS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a transitional living program with 25 long-term, apartment-style units. Offers supportive services, including case management and life skills training for independent living. The program has three tiers with placement determined by age, skills, needs, and availability. The location is determined after the application is approved. No emergency services. 225 SW 4th Street Corvallis, OR 97333 Eligibility: Individuals experiencing homelessness or at risk of being homeless Hours: 24 hours per day / 7 days a week Email (541) 360-8482 .. Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (541) 223-8844 Main phone Salvador Main phone (541) 360-8482 Kevin Shimomaeda [email protected] Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Visit website to complete application. Call or email for more information. FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None at intake LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: Benton and Linn Counties SITE HOURS: Services: Case/Care Management * Youth Issues Life Skills Education Transitional Housing/Shelter * Homeless Youth Other Services Offered At This Location: DONOR SERVICES - DONATIONS INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - MENTORING INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - OUTREACH INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - PEER SUPPORT 541 LEISURE ACTIVITIES/RECREATION - TOPSOCCER MUTUAL SUPPORT - QUEER PEERS If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
